headline: Deere & Company Stock: Is DE Underperforming the Industrials Sector?
summary: Deere & Company has underperformed the industrials sector, and analysts remain somewhat optimistic about the stock’s outlook.

headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on Deere, Maintains $752 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Sabahat Khan   reiterates Deere (NYSE:DE) with a Outperform and maintains $752 price target.
